data.author: Paul Milliken
data.message: axis.py now enters slow loop if connection to camera is lost.  axis_ptz.py now has option for speed_control or position_control.  teleop_twist.py and axis_twist.py have been removed as they are superceded by speed control option in axis_ptz.py.  Mirror function added to axis_ptz.py in addition to flipped.  A few more test launch files added but more are required.

data.message: Added stack.xml to make this a unary stack.

data.message: Added fps=0 in command line to force unlimited framerate
